reviews.review_title: Just like when I was a kid...
reviews.review_description: The idea is to take a metal loop, hold it at one end of a metal pipe, that curves in many ways, and pass the loop onto the pipe and follow it to the end without touching the metal loop to the metal pipe.  I played this a lot as a kid in arcades. I believe this game has great potential but is still in the development stage and needs work. I want to wait until some of the bugs are worked out before giving my rating.  The bug I had is when I first enter the room, the table with the piping is set way off to my left while I am sitting at a desk. I could not use the controllers to move to the table to play, and I could not physically move in my space enough because everything would go black.  I did try "recentering" myself, but it did not move me at all, so I was almost completely unable to play the game. If anyone knows how to fix this problem I would appreciate it much.

i like that game in general and here its everything what you need... music, high adjust, easy and hard mode... but there are tracking issues... i tried the loop in level 6 and everytime i turn my controller it become shaky... impossible to play it with that... hope you can stabilize the tracking... and the other thing i would like to have is passthrough mode... just the table in your normal envirement...

reviews.review_title: Fun, super challenging with some issues
reviews.review_description:
My video review: https://youtu.be/V0sVy25ViRE

The Wire Loop Game VR is a VR remake of the classic Buzz Wire game that tests your hand-eye coordination and patience. It offers challenging levels, a timer that keeps the pressure on, and is perfect for those who want to test their dexterity. While there are some drawbacks like lack of scene rotation, controller rotation comfort, and left-handed controller switch limitations, the core gameplay is fun and engaging with plenty of levels to keep you entertained.

Pretty addictive tbf and loads of wires hope there’s  more to come, like move the table where ever and pass through mode would be sweet, but really good as is 4stars

Also seen on your website other vr games are they coming to applab too??
